name: Zscaler, Inc.
description: Zscaler, Inc. is a leading American cloud security company headquartered in San Jose, California. Founded in 2007, the company provides a comprehensive cloud-based internet security platform designed to protect enterprise networks, applications, and data. By leveraging a zero-trust architecture, Zscaler enables organizations to securely connect users to applications regardless of their location or device. The company's innovative solutions help businesses accelerate their digital transformation by replacing traditional network security appliances with a scalable, cloud-native service that ensures safe and fast access to the internet and private applications.
